headlines.title: Negotiators for U.S. and Iran reach deal
headlines.description: An official tells NBC News that negotiators for the U.S. and Iran have reached a deal to end the war. That official tells us it’s just waiting for a signoff from President Trump and from Iranian leaders. NBC News’ Richard Engel has the story.

headlines.title: Alarming rise in weight loss drug overdoses
headlines.description: In an investigative report in partnership with KFF Health News, NBC News’ Anne Thompson reports on the growing cases of overdoses involving GLP-1 weight loss drugs.

headlines.title: L.A. mayoral candidate Spencer Pratt accuses Karen Bass of 'criminal negligence'
headlines.description: Los Angeles mayoral candidate and former reality TV star Spencer Pratt sits down with NBC News' Tom Llamas to discuss his campaign, in which he accuses Mayor Karen Bass and Governor Gavin Newsom of "criminal negligence" over their handling of the devastating L.A. wildfires.

headlines.title: Teen ‘takeovers’ push cities to take action as experts see echoes of the Covid pandemic
headlines.description: Teenagers behaving badly in groups is hardly a new thing, experts said. But social media has made it easier to rapidly mobilize this generation of teenagers, who may be craving social interaction and looking for an outlet after having spent their formative years isolated during the Covid pandemic.

headlines.title: Feds say ex-NBA player Terry Rozier accepted $100K bribe in sports betting scheme
headlines.description: Former NBA player Terry Rozier was hit with new federal charges of sports bribery and honest services wire fraud conspiracy in a massive sports betting investigation that has rocked the league.

headlines.title: Student commencement boos are a sign of wider AI woes
headlines.description: As companies race to weave AI into nearly every industry, some college students are responding with open hostility

headlines.title: Extended Interview: Tom Llamas sits down with Secretary of State Marco Rubio
headlines.description: On the sidelines of the Trump-Xi Summit in Beijing, NBC News' Tom Llamas sits down with Secretary of State Marco Rubio to discuss China policy, the war with Iran, the future of Cuba, and more.

headlines.title: Indicted terrorist commander allegedly spoke of wanting to target Ivanka Trump
headlines.description: The commander of a terrorist organization is alleged to have discussed wanting to target Ivanka Trump, President Donald Trump’s oldest daughter, as part of a series of attacks, according to three sources familiar with the matter

headlines.title: GLP-1 overdoses increase at an alarming rate as weight loss drugs become easier to buy online
headlines.description: Within 24 hours of injecting the first dose of a weight loss medication she received following a visit with a telehealth doctor, Karleigh McClain was admitted to the hospital, she said

headlines.title: 6 bodies recovered from Washington paper mill as effort to dilute contaminated water is underway
headlines.description: The bodies of six of nine missing people have been recovered from the site of a chemical tank implosion and rupture in Washington state, officials said Thursday, and efforts were being made to dilute contaminated water

headlines.title: ‘Extremely dangerous’ suspect linked to 3 deaths in Hawaii is arrested after manhunt
headlines.description: Authorities in Hawaii were searching for a suspect described as “extremely dangerous” in connection with the killings of three men on the Big Island this week.

headlines.title: California mom sentenced to 35 years for throwing alcohol-fueled underage parties
headlines.description: A California mother was sentenced to more than three decades in prison for holding alcohol-fueled, sexualized parties for teens.
